query:
SELECT 
  os.id, os.numeroOs, os.status, os.placa, os.km,
  c.nomeCompleto as cliente,
  v.modelo as veiculo,
  col.nome as consultor,
  mec.nome as mecanico,
  os.totalOrcamento,
  os.motivoVisita,
  os.primeiraVez
FROM `09_ordens_servico` os
JOIN `07_clientes` c ON c.id = os.clienteId
JOIN `08_veiculos` v ON v.id = os.veiculoId
LEFT JOIN `01_colaboradores` col ON col.id = os.colaboradorId
LEFT JOIN `03_mecanicos` mec ON mec.id = os.mecanicoId
ORDER BY os.id DESC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT id, tipo, descricao, valorTotal, prioridade, status
FROM `11_ordens_servico_itens`
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 5;

FROM `11_ordens_servico_itens`
ORDER BY id DESC
